# SUPPORT_MATRIX

<!-- Generated by `agent-runtime render --target support-matrix`; edit `manifests/surfaces.yaml`. -->

Unified human-readable view of which Codex and Claude harness primitives `agent-runtime-kit` ships into today, by what mechanism, and at what version floor.

## Matrix

| surface | product | state | mechanism | source_artifact | min_product | min_nils_cli | ci_acceptance | live_acceptance | source_manifest |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1. home prompt (`AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md`) | codex | shipped | `agent-runtime render --target home-prompt --product codex` writes `build/codex/AGENT_HOME.md`; `$CODEX_HOME/AGENTS.md` symlinks to that rendered file | `AGENT_HOME.md`<br>`build/codex/AGENT_HOME.md` | 0.130.0 | v1.12.1 | ŌĆö (home-policy cutover only) | `test -e "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/AGENTS.md"` (exit 0) | `docs/source/harness-shape-codex.md#1-home-scope-prompt-agentsmd`<br>`AGENT_HOME.md` |

First-time `setup.sh` delegates the same activation after bootstrap. | `targets/codex/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`<br>`scripts/sync-runtime-surfaces.sh` | 0.141.0 | v0.17.5 | gate 8 (runtime-smoke codex plugin-registry probes: default dry-run prints the activation plan without executing it; stubbed apply registers codex-kit and installs each <plugin>@codex-kit) | `sync-runtime-surfaces.sh --apply --product codex` then `codex plugin list` includes `<plugin>@codex-kit`; `codex debug prompt-input` lists skills as `<plugin>:<skill>` | `docs/source/harness-shape-codex.md#4-plugin-marketplace-agentspluginsmarketplacejson`<br>`manifests/product-capabilities.yaml`<br>`targets/codex/link-map.yaml` |
